g.text: - Self-Attention: lets each word look at other words and
gather the information that matters most.
- Add & Norm keeps the original meaning while combining it with
the new information in a more stable and organized way.
- Feed Forward further processes this information so the model
can refine and strengthen its understanding.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Self-Attention vs Add & Norm vs Feed Forward
- Multi-head attention captures different relationships via
- Each head has its own Q, K, and V projections and computes
- The outputs are concatenated and projected to form a richer

g.text: - Dividing by √d_k for scaling: dot-product scores from becoming too
large, which helps make training more stable.
- Softmax: then turns these scores into normalized weights, so the
model can decide how much attention to give to each word.

g.text: Q (Query): what information this token is looking for
K (Key): what features this token exposes for matching
V (Value): the information this token provides if attended to
